title: War God Shrine Sect
content:
Background
[
]

War God Shrine
 is a sect in the Rank 3 country of 
Hou Fen
. It is famous because their ancestor found the 
Divine Path
 Technique that create an Avatar to help cultivators breakthrough to 
Nascent Soul
 Stage. The sect has six Nascent Soul Stage cultivators.

Plot
[
]

Wang Lin
 assume Ma Liang identity as War God Shrine Sect disciple, after he seized the disciple corpse in 
Foreign Battleground
 when he was a soul devourer. Later he use his identity as the sect disciple to learn the Divine Path Technique after back from 
Sea of Devil
 with 
Duanmu Ji.
